zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mitchell於1628年8月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利時，她的父親Experience Mitchell26歲，母親Jane Cooke25歲。她於1645年12月6日與John Washburn Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1684年12月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特享年56歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Mitchell于1628年8月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利时，她的父亲Experience Mitchell26岁，母亲Jane Cooke25岁。她于1645年12月6日与John Washburn Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1684年12月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特享年56岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Mitchell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the vernacular pronunciation in Middle English and Older Scots of the personal name   Michael  . See   Michelson  .
English and Scottish: nickname for a big man, from Middle English michel, mechel, muchel ‘big’.
Irish (County Connacht): surname adopted as equivalent of   Mulvihill  .

variants.name: Michell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Etienne, Yvrose.
English (Cornwall): variant of   Mitchell   and   Michel  .
German: variant of   Michel  . This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Mutch
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Lancashire and Cheshire): nickname for a large (tall or fat) person, from Middle English moche, muche ‘big’ (a shortened form of mochel, muchel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Muckle .

variants.name: Meikle
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Middle Scots mekill, meikill ‘big’. Compare Mitchell 2, Muckle , and Mutch .

variants.name: Mickle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’. Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Mutch .
Americanized form of German   Mickel   1 or of a homonymous Germanized Sorbian surname (see   Mickel   2).

variants.name: Michael
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Jewish, and Greek: from the personal name Michael, ultimately from Hebrew Mika’el ‘Who is like God?’. This was borne by an archangel in the Bible, the protector of Israel (Daniel 10:13, 12:1; Rev. 12:7). In Christian tradition, Michael was regarded as the warrior archangel, conqueror of Satan, and the personal name was correspondingly popular throughout Europe, especially in knightly and military families. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Mihály (see Mihaly ), Czech and Slovak Michal , Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Mikhael and Mikhail , and also patronymics and other derivatives from these names, e.g. Greek Papamichael , its cognate Papamichalis, and Michaelides , Serbian Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ), and Slovenian Mihelčič (see Mihelcic ). Compare Mikeal .

variants.name: Mixell
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Mitchell  .

variants.name: Muckle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname for a big man, from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’ (Old English mycel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle and Mutch .
South German: from a diminutive of   Muck   ‘gnat’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mitchell was born on 27 August 1628, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Experience Mitchell, was 26 and her mother, Jane Cooke, was 25. She married John Washburn Jr. on 6 December 1645, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 December 1684, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mitchell est née le 27 août 1628, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Experience Mitchell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Cooke, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Washburn Jr. le 6 décembre 1645, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1684, à Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mitchell am 27. August 1628 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Experience Mitchell 26 und ihre Mutter Jane Cooke 25. Sie hat am 6. Dezember 1645 in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America John Washburn Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Dezember 1684 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mitchell è nata il il 27 agosto 1628 nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Experience Mitchell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jane Cooke, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Washburn Jr. il 6 dicembre 1645, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 dicembre 1684, nel Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mitchellが1628年8月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーで生まれた時，父Experience Mitchellは26歳，母Jane Cookeは25歳であった。1645年12月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーでJohn Washburn Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年12月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターで56歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターにて埋葬された。

ko.Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이

ko.Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어
ko.Bridgewater, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mitchell(이)가 1628년 8월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Experience Mitchell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Cooke(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1645년 12월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 John Washburn Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1684년 12월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mitchell nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1628, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Experience Mitchell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane Cooke, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Washburn Jr. em 6 de dezembro de 1645, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1684, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mitchell родилась 27 августа 1628 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Experience Mitchell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Cooke, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Washburn Jr. 6 декабря 1645 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 5 декабря 1684 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
